summary: Verified bug fixes: (1) Payroll Summary section expands without JavaScript errors - Save icon import issue fixed, (2) Mileage Report modal has visible X close button and Download button on both desktop and mobile viewports.

bugs_verified_fixed.issue: Payroll Summary throws errors when selected
Mileage report PDF preview broken - no download button and missing X exit on mobile
fix_applied: Added prominent X close button with gray background (p-2 bg-gray-100)
Sticky footer with Download button always visible
Improved mobile responsiveness with proper padding and sizing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both Payroll Summary and Mileage Tracking Reports bugs are fixed. The Save icon import was added to AdminDashboard.jsx. The MileageTrackingSection.jsx was updated with better mobile support - X button now has gray background and is prominently visible, Download button is in a sticky footer. Tested on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports.
